Metadata.Title: If I Can Do This, So Can You!
Metadata.Description: 5 targets, all in public view and with no easy elimination options, killed with an item not even obtainable in this level, all bodies hidden, all without firing a single shot or leaving a trace. If i've done this, so can you, but, should anybody catch on in any capacity, the game's up; Contract Invalidated. The only clue you get? The item the targets need to be eliminated with is one you have to start with. Best of luck Agent.
